title: The Lewd Trap Tower: A Secretly Perverted Rookie Adventurer
description:
An adult-oriented top-down pixel-art 2D action game.
Attack, defend, and dash—manage your stamina while exploring a tower and conquer a dangerous structure filled with monsters and traps.

■ Game Features◆ Tactical Stamina-Based Combat
Every action—attacking, defending, dashing, and even taking damage—consumes stamina. When your stamina is depleted, you become vulnerable, making stamina management essential.

◆ Build Your Own Playstyle
Customize your strategy using a variety of equipment. Choose between high-risk, high-damage builds or safer, more balanced setups as you conquer the tower.

◆ Adult Content
Includes 29 animated scenes and 7 event CGs (some animated). Character visuals dynamically change based on damage and in-game situations.

◆ Other Systems

• Save/Load system (3 slots)

• Key binding settings available

• Gamepad support

■ StoryKohli, a rookie adventurer, was waiting for the return of her childhood friend Solor, an experienced adventurer. However, no news came, and driven by anxiety, she set out for the tower where her mission awaited.

It was a dangerous tower filled with monsters and traps—.
description_short: An adult-oriented top-down pixel 2D action game focused on stamina management. Attack, defend, and dash your way through a perilous tower in search of a missing companion.
